qa_comment: Future raw files stay under data/raw/covalent_sources and outside commits.
A future gate may choose a CIF subdirectory, but this step creates none.
PDB files, if ever allowed, must remain untracked.
Future logs should be derived metadata, not raw structures.
Failure logs should be explicit metadata.
Design outputs are separate from raw storage.
Future download gates must verify raw remains outside git.
No raw structure or ligand files may be committed.
Partial downloads must be cleaned or quarantined in a future gate.
